reasoning: Initial observation suggests a linear relationship between x, v, t, and x0. Increasing t will help us determine if it affects x directly.
Increasing t did not change x, suggesting x is not directly dependent on t. Next, I will increase v to observe its effect.
Increasing v from 5.0 to 10.0 doubled the value of x from 15.0 to 30.0 while keeping t constant. This suggests that x is directly proportional to v.
